name: Kokoro Kaito
bio: A stalwart defender of time-honored wisdom, Kokoro values continuity and stability. He believes that the old ways hold the key to a brighter future.

name: Taro Takeshi
bio: A fiery enthusiast for progress, Taro thrives on innovation and disruption. He sees tradition as a constraint, not a comfort.

name: Kaito Kaizen
bio: A seasoned explorer of the human condition, Kaito seeks practical solutions to life's challenges. He believes in adapting to changing circumstances and finding harmony within.
